diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_outputs.py
+++ b/inspect_outputs.py
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+import os

+import json

+import torch

+from PIL import Image

+from transformers import AutoProcessor, Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration

+

+SYSTEM = (

+    "You are a GUI grounding assistant. Locate the UI element described by the user "

+    "and output its coordinates as <box>x1 y1 x2 y2</box> or <point>x y</point>."

+)

+

+def load_model(path):

+    processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(

+        path,

+        trust_remote_code=True,

+        min_pixels=256 * 28 * 28,

+        max_pixels=1280 * 28 * 28,

+    )

+    model = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(

+        path,

+        trust_remote_code=True,

+        torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16,

+        device_map="auto",

+    )

+    model.eval()

+    return processor, model

+

+def infer(processor, model, row, use_system):

+    image = Image.open(os.path.join("/data", row["image_path"])).convert("RGB")

+    messages = []

+    if use_system:

+        messages.append({"role": "system", "content": SYSTEM})

+    messages.append(

+        {

+            "role": "user",

+            "content": [

+                {"type": "image", "image": row["image_path"]},

+                {"type": "text", "text": row["instruction"]},

+            ],

+        }

+    )

+    text = processor.apply_chat_template(

+        messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True

+    )

+    inputs = processor(

+        text=[text], images=[image], return_tensors="pt", padding="longest"

+    ).to(model.device)

+    with torch.no_grad():

+        out = model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=64, do_sample=False)

+    out = out[:, inputs.input_ids.shape[1] :]

+    return processor.batch_decode(out, skip_special_tokens=True)[0].strip()

+

+def main():

+    with open("/data/unified_val.jsonl", "r") as f:

+        rows = [json.loads(line) for line in f][:10]

+

+    print("=== Base model (no system prompt) ===")

+    proc, model = load_model("/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct/")

+    for r in rows:

+        out = infer(proc, model, r, use_system=False)

+        print(f"  {r['id'][:28]}: {out[:120]}")

+    del model

+    torch.cuda.empty_cache()

+

+    print("\n=== Base model (with system prompt) ===")

+    proc2, model2 = load_model("/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct/")

+    for r in rows:

+        out = infer(proc2, model2, r, use_system=True)

+        print(f"  {r['id'][:28]}: {out[:120]}")

+    del model2

+    torch.cuda.empty_cache()

+

+    print("\n=== Fine-tuned merged (with system prompt) ===")

+    proc3, model3 = load_model("checkpoints/merged/")

+    for r in rows:

+        out = infer(proc3, model3, r, use_system=True)

+        print(f"  {r['id'][:28]}: {out[:120]}")

+

+if __name__ == "__main__":

+    main()

--- a/inspect_val.py
+++ b/inspect_val.py
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+import os

+import json

+import re

+import torch

+from PIL import Image

+from transformers import AutoProcessor, Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration

+

+SYSTEM = "You are a GUI grounding assistant. Locate the UI element described by the user and output its coordinates as <box>x1 y1 x2 y2</box> or <point>x y</point>."

+

+def load_model(model_path):

+    processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(

+        model_path,

+        trust_remote_code=True,

+        min_pixels=256 * 28 * 28,

+        max_pixels=1280 * 28 * 28,

+    )

+    model = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(

+        model_path,

+        trust_remote_code=True,

+        torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16,

+        device_map="auto",

+    )

+    model.eval()

+    return processor, model

+

+def run(processor, model, row, use_system):

+    image = Image.open(os.path.join("/data", row["image_path"])).convert("RGB")

+    messages = []

+    if use_system:

+        messages.append({"role": "system", "content": SYSTEM})

+    messages.append({

+        "role": "user",

+        "content": [

+            {"type": "image", "image": row["image_path"]},

+            {"type": "text", "text": row["instruction"]},

+        ],

+    })

+    text = processor.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)

+    inputs = processor(text=[text], images=[image], return_tensors="pt", padding="longest").to(model.device)

+    with torch.no_grad():

+        out = model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=64, do_sample=False)

+    out = out[:, inputs.input_ids.shape[1]:]

+    return processor.batch_decode(out, skip_special_tokens=True)[0].strip()

+

+def main():

+    with open("/data/unified_val.jsonl", "r") as f:

+        rows = [json.loads(line) for line in f]

+    # pick a diverse handful

+    samples = rows[::32][:10]

+

+    print("=== Fine-tuned (merged) WITH system ===")

+    proc_ft, model_ft = load_model("checkpoints/merged/")

+    for r in samples:

+        out = run(proc_ft, model_ft, r, use_system=True)

+        gt = r.get("target_bbox") or r.get("target_point")

+        print(f"  {r['id'][:24]} | OUT: {out[:90]:90} | GT: {gt}")

+    del model_ft

+    torch.cuda.empty_cache()

+

+    print("\n=== Base model WITH system ===")

+    proc_b, model_b = load_model("/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct/")

+    for r in samples:

+        out = run(proc_b, model_b, r, use_system=True)

+        gt = r.get("target_bbox") or r.get("target_point")

+        print(f"  {r['id'][:24]} | OUT: {out[:90]:90} | GT: {gt}")

+

+    print("\n=== Base model NO system ===")

+    for r in samples:

+        out = run(proc_b, model_b, r, use_system=False)

+        gt = r.get("target_bbox") or r.get("target_point")

+        print(f"  {r['id'][:24]} | OUT: {out[:90]:90} | GT: {gt}")

+

+if __name__ == "__main__":

+    main()
